auth.accountDeactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact administrator.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.logoutConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out of this account?
auth.magicLinkSent: A sign-in link has been sent to your email. Check your inbox and click the link to continue.
auth.callbackError: Failed to process authentication. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up to start using the application
auth.registerSuccessVerify: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.emailAlreadyRegistered: Email is already registered. Please sign in.
auth.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email. We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If the email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password changed successfully. Redirecting to dashboard...
auth.resetPasswordInvalidSession: Reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
auth.publicSignupDisabled: Public signup is currently disabled. Please contact administrator.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.passwordMinLengthRegister: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.fullNameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.fullNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters

dashboard.underDevelopmentMessage: {appName} is currently under development. Features will be available soon. Use the navigation menu to access available pages.

overview.placeholderMessage: This page is under development. Statistics and overview will be displayed here.

profile.editComingSoon: Profile editing feature is under development

settings.placeholderMessage: This page is under development. System settings will be available here.
settings.integrationsSubtitle: Connect third-party services to your account

admin.loggedInAs: You are logged in as {name} with the role of {role}

menu.masterDataDesc: Manage reference data and system configuration

admin.placeholderMessage: Administration features are under development and will be available soon.
admin.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to access this page.

commerce.pageSubtitle: Product catalog from your Lemon Squeezy store
commerce.connectSubtitle: Enter your Lemon Squeezy API key to start syncing products
commerce.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Lemon Squeezy API key
commerce.apiKeyHint: Get your API key from Lemon Squeezy Dashboard → Settings → API
commerce.testModeDescription: Enable to use a test API key
commerce.disconnectConfirmDescription: Once disconnected, product data will not be accessible until you reconnect. Credentials will be permanently deleted.
commerce.errorInvalidCredentials: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
commerce.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
commerce.errorForbidden: API key doesn't have sufficient access.
commerce.errorNetwork: Failed to reach Lemon Squeezy servers. Check your internet connection.
commerce.errorApiGeneric: An error occurred while calling Lemon Squeezy API.
commerce.errorDecryptFailed: Failed to read credentials. Please reconnect.
commerce.errorNotConnected: You haven't connected your Lemon Squeezy account yet.
commerce.productsEmptySubtitle: No products found in your store. Create products in Lemon Squeezy dashboard.
commerce.productsNotConnectedSubtitle: Connect your account first to view products.

common.notConnected: Lemon Squeezy is not connected. Connect your account from the integrations settings page.

subscriptions.pageDescription: Manage active subscriptions from Lemon Squeezy

confirmPause.title: Pause this subscription?
confirmPause.description: The customer will not be billed until the subscription is resumed. Access will be suspended during pause.

confirmResume.title: Resume this subscription?
confirmResume.description: The customer will be billed again and access will be restored.

confirmCancel.title: Cancel this subscription?
confirmCancel.description: The subscription will be cancelled but the customer keeps access until the period ends.

webhooks.pageDescription: Configure webhook to receive real-time events from Lemon Squeezy
webhooks.title: Webhook Configuration
webhooks.notConnectedDescription: Webhook not configured yet. Generate URL and secret to start receiving events from Lemon Squeezy.
webhooks.urlHelp: Copy this URL and register it at Lemon Squeezy Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks
webhooks.secretHintHelp: The actual secret cannot be shown again. Regenerate to create a new one.
webhooks.secretRevealWarning: This secret is shown only once. Copy and save it in a safe place. Once you close this page, the secret cannot be viewed again.

confirmRegenerate.title: Regenerate webhook?
confirmRegenerate.description: Old URL and secret will be replaced. You must update the configuration in Lemon Squeezy dashboard.

confirmDelete.title: Delete webhook configuration?
confirmDelete.description: Events from Lemon Squeezy will no longer be received until the webhook is set up again.
